query: UPDATE subscriptions SET status = 'active', startedAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, initialPeriodEndsAt = (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() + 365*24*60*60) * 1000, currentPeriodEnd = (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() + 30*24*60*60) * 1000 WHERE id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2LaWadDEvwzJBKf.root --database 2yeo54CKUnZhz2uBtEnQQ8 --execute UPDATE subscriptions SET status = 'active', startedAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, initialPeriodEndsAt = (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() + 365*24*60*60) * 1000, currentPeriodEnd = (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() + 30*24*60*60) * 1000 WHERE id = 1;
